Introduction to Lipscomb County

Arrows in Lipscomb County

Arrow #27: Higgins

More Details for Arrow #27

Coordinates: 36.116986, -100.0312976

Installed: February 10, 2012

Marker Text:

Comanche Cheyenne & Kiowa Indians frequented E E Polly's Stations in era of the 1874 Red River War

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Arrow #28: Lipscomb

More Details for Arrow #28

Coordinates: 36.2339038, -100.2756239

Installed: February 10, 2012

Marker Text:

Wolf Creek north of here provided a watering and camp site for Indian hunting parties

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
